title: hordeum maritimum subsp. hystrix
intro: Hordeum maritimum subsp. hystrix, also known as sea barley or sea barley grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Hordeum maritimum subsp. hystrix include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
